inputs.srepr: Add(Mul(Symbol('lambda_1', positive=True, real=True), Pow(Derivative(Function('f')(Symbol('r', positive=True, real=True)), Tuple(Symbol('r', positive=True, real=True), Integer(1))), Integer(2))), Mul(Symbol('lambda_2', positive=True, real=True), Pow(Derivative(Function('f')(Symbol('r', positive=True, real=True)), Tuple(Symbol('r', positive=True, real=True), Integer(2))), Integer(2))), Mul(Pow(Add(Function('f')(Symbol('r', positive=True, real=True)), Mul(Integer(-1), Function('f_ext')(Symbol('r', positive=True, real=True)))), Integer(2)), Function('W_ext')(Symbol('r', positive=True, real=True))), Mul(Pow(Add(Function('f')(Symbol('r', positive=True, real=True)), Mul(Integer(-1), Function('f_int')(Symbol('r', positive=True, real=True)))), Integer(2)), Function('W_int')(Symbol('r', positive=True, real=True))))
inputs.latex: \lambda_{1} \left(\frac{d}{d r} f{\left(r \right)}\right)^{2} + \lambda_{2} \left(\frac{d^{2}}{d r^{2}} f{\left(r \right)}\right)^{2} + \left(f{\left(r \right)} - f_{ext}{\left(r \right)}\right)^{2} W_{ext}{\left(r \right)} + \left(f{\left(r \right)} - f_{int}{\left(r \right)}\right)^{2} W_{int}{\left(r \right)}

output.srepr: Add(Mul(Integer(-1), Integer(2), Symbol('lambda_1', positive=True, real=True), Derivative(Function('f')(Symbol('r', positive=True, real=True)), Tuple(Symbol('r', positive=True, real=True), Integer(2)))), Mul(Integer(2), Symbol('lambda_2', positive=True, real=True), Derivative(Function('f')(Symbol('r', positive=True, real=True)), Tuple(Symbol('r', positive=True, real=True), Integer(4)))), Mul(Integer(2), Add(Function('f')(Symbol('r', positive=True, real=True)), Mul(Integer(-1), Function('f_ext')(Symbol('r', positive=True, real=True)))), Function('W_ext')(Symbol('r', positive=True, real=True))), Mul(Integer(2), Add(Function('f')(Symbol('r', positive=True, real=True)), Mul(Integer(-1), Function('f_int')(Symbol('r', positive=True, real=True)))), Function('W_int')(Symbol('r', positive=True, real=True))))
output.latex: - 2 \lambda_{1} \frac{d^{2}}{d r^{2}} f{\left(r \right)} + 2 \lambda_{2} \frac{d^{4}}{d r^{4}} f{\left(r \right)} + 2 \left(f{\left(r \right)} - f_{ext}{\left(r \right)}\right) W_{ext}{\left(r \right)} + 2 \left(f{\left(r \right)} - f_{int}{\left(r \right)}\right) W_{int}{\left(r \right)}

method: compute EL = dL/df - d/dr(dL/df') + d^2/dr^2(dL/df'') for L = W_int*(f-f_int)^2 + W_ext*(f-f_ext)^2 + lam1*(f')^2 + lam2*(f'')^2
scope: toy variational model with arbitrary weight functions W_int, W_ext; lambda_1 and lambda_2 are free parameters not derived from action; do not treat as physical prediction
